buildCommand: node apps/web/scripts/xliff-to-json.mjs apps/web/src/locale/messages.hu.xlf apps/web/public/assets/i18n/hu.json && node apps/web/scripts/xliff-to-json.mjs apps/web/src/locale/messages.en.xlf apps/web/public/assets/i18n/en.json && npx nx build web --configuration=production && npx esbuild api/_handler.ts --bundle --packages=external --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=api/_bundle.js --tsconfig=api/tsconfig.json --format=cjs
